data.body: Ported in 94a1feeb: tag/untag read current tags via the shared reducer, emit EDIT(data.fields.tags), idempotent (present-add / absent-remove are no-ops). Switch-wired dispatcher+library. Dual-run green bash AND python on test-ticket-tag (9) + test-ticket-list-has-tag (13); library round-trip/idempotency parity tests added. Default stays bash.
